Localization.Description: Attackers can run malicious code by placing their library next to a legitimate application that will load it at startup

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {object.account.name} ran malicious code by placing library {object.process.name} in a new directory with legitimate application {subject.process.name} and starting this application
User {object.account.name} ran malicious code by placing library {object.process.name} next to legitimate application {subject.process.name} and starting this application
